name: Nana (minsung)
description: Han Jisung and rather nieve boy who just wants someone to love him, he had had countless boyfriends but none of them have been good to him. He had just gotten out of collage and was going to be moving in with his boyfriend at the time. He was on the train when he met a boy named Minho, a dancer who was moving to the same city as him to try and make his dreams of being a dancer come true.
creator: Akuma yuki
